trade.summary: Growing bilateral trade. Svizzera exports pharmaceuticals, machinery, and chemicals. Polonia exports machinery, furniture, food products, and automotive components. A large Polish diaspora in Svizzera facilitates people-to-people links.

diplomatic.summary: Friendly relations. Both countries support democratic values and a rules-based international order. Polonia appreciates Svizzera's financial sector and role as a neutral mediator. Svizzera has contributed to EU cohesion funds that benefit Polonia (Swiss Contribution). Coordination on Ucraina/Russia issues.

military.summary: Svizzera is neutral; Polonia is a NATO member focused on eastern flank security. No formal military cooperation. Svizzera has provided humanitarian support related to Russia-Ucraina conflict.

financial.summary: Swiss companies are major investors in Polonia, particularly in pharmaceuticals, retail, and manufacturing. Swiss banks provide financial services to Polish companies. Growing bilateral investment as Polonia's economy develops.

energy.summary: Limited direct energy trade. Svizzera supports Polonia's energy transition through investment. Both connected through European energy networks.

scientific.summary: Growing scientific cooperation. ETH Zurich and Swiss universities collaborate with Polish institutions through Horizon Europe. Joint publications in physics, chemistry, and IT are increasing.
